framework: UNESCO AI Competency Framework for Teachers (AI-CFT) 2024
note: Performance-based competency mapping. Strength is a ceiling on observed evidence_strength. Scorer must add item-specific rationale and confidence.

WS4_B1.rationale: Places an improved threshold between adjacent food-card values (avocado / french fries boundary).

WS4_B2.rationale: Identifies all misclassified foods at the prior threshold — error-pattern recognition.

WS4_B3.rationale: Reflects that misclassification decreased after threshold improvement.

WS4_B4.rationale: Evaluates Pia's claim that equal fat values (apple / raspberry jam) prevent a threshold split.

WS4_B5.rationale: States a learned energy threshold from the food-card dataset (valid range 160–2223).
